---
title: ""
---

<h1 style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">Contact Us</h1>

Let's discuss your next geospatial project. Please email malaso.susan@gmail.com and we will get back to you within 2 business days.

You can also send us a message using the form below.

<h1 style="text-align:center; color:#2A5A5C; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
  Contact Us
</h1>

<div class="contact-wrapper">

  <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mrevavwz" method="POST">

    <label class="form-label">Email</label>
    <input type="email" name="email" required class="form-control custom-input">

    <label class="form-label mt-3">Name</label>
    <input type="text" name="name" required class="form-control custom-input">

    <label class="form-label mt-3">Message</label>
    <textarea name="message" rows="5" required class="form-control custom-input"></textarea>

    <!-- reCAPTCHA widget -->
    <div class="mt-4" style="transform:scale(0.95); transform-origin:0 0;">
      <div class="g-recaptcha" data-sitekey="YOUR_SITE_KEY"></div>
    </div>

    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary contact-btn mt-4">
      Submit
    </button>

  </form>

</div>

<!-- Load reCAPTCHA -->
<script src="https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js" async defer></script>
